messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Develop a playful PowerPoint presentation for students in the Education industry covering basic biology concepts, containing exactly 10 slides with a colorful theme using bright green, yellow, and blue palettes. The output filename must be "Biology_Lesson.pptx". Write all presentation content in English and use 4:3 Standard orientation. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping; generate all data locally based on standard biology facts. When creating charts, you must use `XL_CHART_TYPE` (e.g., `XL_CHART_TYPE.XY_SCATTER`) instead of importing or using `ChartType` from `pptx.enum.chart`. Before attempting to set the text of a slide's title shape, you must first verify that `slide.shapes.title is not None` and only then access `.text`. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. Code blocks must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text explanations must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(8)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(6)

GREEN = RGBColor(46, 204, 113)
YELLOW = RGBColor(241, 196, 15)
BLUE = RGBColor(52, 152, 219)
DARK_BLUE = RGBColor(44, 62, 80)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(236, 240, 241)
ORANGE = RGBColor(243, 156, 18)
PURPLE = RGBColor(155, 89, 182)

FONT_HEADING = "Aptos"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color=DARK_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = color
    p.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_HEADING
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=WHITE, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p0 = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p0.text = title
    p0.font.size = Pt(14)
    p0.font.bold = True
    p0.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE
    p0.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    if body:
        p1 = tf.add_paragraph()
        p1.text = body
        p1.font.size = Pt(11)
        p1.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE
        p1.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text):
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.25), Inches(6.8), Inches(0.4))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = BLUE
    bar.line.fill.background()

    label_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.9), Inches(1.27), Inches(6.2), Inches(0.35), text, font_size=18, bold=True, color=WHITE)


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=10):
    footer = add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(5.7), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.3), f"{slide_num} / {total}", font_size=9, color=DARK_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height, alt_text="Image"):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = BLUE
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)

        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = alt_text
        run.font.size = Pt(14)
        run.font.color.rgb = BLUE


def add_circle(slide, left, top, size, color):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left, top, size, size)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


# ─── Slide Builders ──────────────────────────────────────────────

def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F0FFF4")

    add_circle(slide, Inches(-1), Inches(-1), Inches(3.5), GREEN)
    add_circle(slide, Inches(7), Inches(4.5), Inches(2.8), YELLOW)
    add_circle(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(-0.5), Inches(1.8), BLUE)

    title_box = slide.shapes.title
    if title_box is not None:
        title_box.text = "Welcome to Biology!"
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(44)
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

    subtitle = add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(5), Inches(0.6), "Explore the Amazing World of Living Things", font_size=22, color=BLUE)
    subtitle.text_frame.paragraphs[0].alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(5), Inches(0.4), "A Fun Journey Through Cells, Plants, Animals & More!", font_size=16, color=DARK_BLUE)
    add_footer(slide, 1)


def build_what_is_biology(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.title
    if title_box is not None:
        title_box.text = "What Is Biology?"
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(36)
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.45), Inches(6.4), Inches(0.5), "Biology is the scientific study of life and living organisms.", font_size=16, color=DARK_BLUE)

    cards_data = [
        ("🔬 Study of Life", "Biology explores everything from tiny cells to entire ecosystems."),
        ("🌱 Living Things", "Plants, animals, fungi, bacteria — all studied in biology!"),
        ("🧪 Scientific Method", "Observation, experiments, and evidence drive biological discovery."),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.0)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = Inches(0.8)
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(cards_data):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(2.1), card_width, Inches(1.6), title, body, WHITE, GREEN if i == 0 else BLUE if i == 1 else YELLOW)

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def build_cell_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F8FFFE")

    title_box = slide.shapes.title
    if title_box is not None:
        title_box.text = "The Cell — Building Block of Life"
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(34)
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/cell_diagram.png", Inches(2.5), Inches(1.6), Inches(3.0), Inches(2.8), "Cell Diagram")

    labels = [
        ("Nucleus", "Controls cell activities"),
        ("Mitochondria", "Powerhouse of the cell"),
        ("Cytoplasm", "Jelly-like substance inside"),
        ("Cell Membrane", "Protects and controls entry/exit"),
    ]
    positions = [
        (Inches(0.5), Inches(1.7)),
        (Inches(5.8), Inches(1.7)),
        (Inches(0.5), Inches(3.2)),
        (Inches(5.8), Inches(3.2)),
    ]
    colors = [GREEN, BLUE, YELLOW, PURPLE]

    for i, ((label, desc), pos) in enumerate(zip(labels, positions)):
        add_card(slide, pos[0], pos[1], Inches(2.0), Inches(1.3), label, desc, WHITE, colors[i])

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def build_photosynthesis_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFF5")

    title_box = slide.shapes.title
    if title_box is not None:
        title_box.text = "Photosynthesis"
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(38)
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.45), Inches(6.4), Inches(0.5), "How plants make their own food using sunlight!", font_size=16, color=DARK_BLUE)

    steps = [
        ("☀️ Sunlight", "Plants absorb light energy"),
        ("💧 Water + CO₂", "Taken from soil and air"),
        ("🍃 Chlorophyll", "Green pigment captures energy"),
        ("🌿 Glucose + O₂", "Food and oxygen produced!"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(1.5)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = Inches(0.8)
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(steps):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(2.1), card_width, Inches(1.6), title, body, WHITE, GREEN if i % 2 == 0 else BLUE)

    arrow_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(3.85), Inches(1.0), Inches(0.4), "→", font_size=28, bold=True, color=YELLOW, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_footer(slide, 4)


def build_dna_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F5F0FF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.title
    if title_box is not None:
        title_box.text = "DNA & Genes"
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(38)
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/dna_helix.png", Inches(2.5), Inches(1.6), Inches(3.0), Inches(2.5), "DNA Helix")

    facts = [
        ("🧬 Double Helix", "DNA has a twisted ladder shape"),
        ("🔑 Genes", "Segments of DNA that code for traits"),
        ("📦 Chromosomes", "Tightly packed DNA in the nucleus"),
        ("🎨 Traits", "Eye color, height — all from genes!"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(1.5)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = Inches(0.8)
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(facts):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(4.3), card_width, Inches(1.2), title, body, WHITE, PURPLE if i % 2 == 0 else GREEN)

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def build_classification_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.title
    if title_box is not None:
        title_box.text = "Classification of Living Things"
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(34)
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.45), Inches(6.4), Inches(0.5), "Scientists group organisms into five kingdoms:", font_size=16, color=DARK_BLUE)

    kingdoms = [
        ("Animalia", "Animals — dogs, birds, fish"),
        ("Plantae", "Plants — trees, flowers, grasses"),
        ("Fungi", "Mushrooms, yeasts, molds"),
        ("Protista", "Amoeba, algae, paramecium"),
        ("Monera", "Bacteria and cyanobacteria"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(1.4)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    colors_kingdoms = [BLUE, GREEN, YELLOW, PURPLE, ORANGE]
    start_x = Inches(0.8)

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(kingdoms):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(2.1) if i < 3 else Inches(3.7)
        col_offset = 0 if i < 3 else -0.95
        add_card(slide, x + Inches(col_offset), y, card_width, Inches(1.4), title, body, WHITE, colors_kingdoms[i])

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def build_ecosystems_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F0FFF4")

    title_box = slide.shapes.title
    if title_box is not None:
        title_box.text = "Ecosystems & Food Chains"
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(34)
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

    organisms = [
        ("☀️ Sun", GREEN),
        ("🌿 Grass (Producer)", GREEN),
        ("🐛 Grasshopper (Herbivore)", YELLOW),
        ("🐸 Frog (Carnivore)", BLUE),
        ("🦅 Hawk (Top Predator)", PURPLE),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(1.2)
    gap = Inches(0.15)
    start_x = Inches(0.6)

    for i, (title, color) in enumerate(organisms):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(2.0), card_width, Inches(1.5), title, "", WHITE, color)

    arrow_text = "→"
    for i in range(len(organisms) - 1):
        x_pos = start_x + (i + 1) * (card_width + gap) - gap / 2
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(x_pos), Inches(2.55), Inches(gap), Inches(0.4), arrow_text, font_size=20, bold=True, color=DARK_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 7)


def build_body_systems_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.title
    if title_box is not None:
        title_box.text = "Human Body Systems"
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(34)
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

    systems = [
        ("🫀 Circulatory", "Heart pumps blood throughout the body"),
        ("🧠 Nervous", "Brain and nerves control everything"),
        ("🫁 Respiratory", "Lungs bring in oxygen, remove CO₂"),
        ("💪 Muscular", "Muscles help us move and stay active"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(3.2)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    colors_sys = [BLUE, PURPLE, GREEN, ORANGE]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(systems):
        row = 0 if i < 2 else 1
        col = i % 2
        x = Inches(0.6) + col * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(1.7) + row * Inches(1.95)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(1.8), title, body, WHITE, colors_sys[i])

    add_footer(slide, 8)


def build_evolution_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F5F0FF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.title
    if title_box is not None:
        title_box.text = "Evolution"
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(38)
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.45), Inches(6.4), Inches(0.5), "How species change over time through natural selection.", font_size=16, color=DARK_BLUE)

    timeline_events = [
        ("3.5 Billion Years Ago", "First single-celled life"),
        ("500 Million Years Ago", "Complex multicellular organisms"),
        ("250 Million Years Ago", "Age of the Dinosaurs"),
        ("65 Million Years Ago", "Mammals begin to diversify"),
        ("300,000 Years Ago", "Modern humans appear"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(1.4)
    gap = Inches(0.2)
    start_x = Inches(0.6)

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(timeline_events):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(2.1) if i < 3 else Inches(3.7)
        col_offset = 0 if i < 3 else -0.95
        color = GREEN if i % 2 == 0 else BLUE
        add_card(slide, x + Inches(col_offset), y, card_width, Inches(1.4), title, body, WHITE, color)

    add_footer(slide, 9)


def build_summary_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F0FFF4")

    title_box = slide.shapes.title
    if title_box is not None:
        title_box.text = "Summary & Quick Quiz!"
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(36)
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.45), Inches(6.4), Inches(0.5), "Let's review what we learned today!", font_size=16, color=DARK_BLUE)

    quiz_questions = [
        ("Q1: What is the powerhouse of the cell?", "Mitochondria!"),
        ("Q2: What do plants need for photosynthesis?", "Sunlight, water, and CO₂!"),
        ("Q3: How many kingdoms are there?", "Five — Animalia, Plantae, Fungi, Protista, Monera!"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(6.0)
    start_x = Inches(0.8)
    for i, (q, a) in enumerate(quiz_questions):
        y = Inches(2.15) + i * Inches(1.3)
        add_card(slide, start_x, y, card_width, Inches(1.1), q, "✅ " + a, WHITE, GREEN if i % 2 == 0 else BLUE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(5.4), Inches(6.4), Inches(0.3), "Great job! Keep exploring the world of biology!", font_size=14, bold=True, color=BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_footer(slide, 10)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    build_title_slide(prs)
    build_what_is_biology(prs)
    build_cell_slide(prs)
    build_photosynthesis_slide(prs)
    build_dna_slide(prs)
    build_classification_slide(prs)
    build_ecosystems_slide(prs)
    build_body_systems_slide(prs)
    build_evolution_slide(prs)
    build_summary_slide(prs)

    prs.save("Biology_Lesson.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
